notes: Section 2801, , , , set out the declaration of purpose for adult basic education programs.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 21278 Stat. 520Aug. 20, 1964

Section 2806, , , , provided for termination of payments for noncompliance with the State plan and for hearings and judicial review.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 21778 Stat. 522Aug. 20, 1964
